_meta.description: Synthetic LTL freight contract & tariff source-of-truth for the invoice auditor.
_meta.rate_basis: Linehaul priced per hundredweight (CWT). charged_linehaul = (weight_lb / 100) * cwt_rate, then customer discount applied, then fuel surcharge applied to the post-discount linehaul.

tariff._note: cwt_rate is dollars per 100 lb. Rates decline as weight increases (standard LTL). Lane = origin_zone-dest_zone. Class is freight class; higher class = denser/higher-value handling = higher rate.

weight_breaks._note: Which break applies is a function of actual billable weight. Lower break = higher per-cwt rate.

fuel_surcharge_schedule._note: Percentage applied to the post-discount linehaul. Keyed by week the shipment dated into. Auditor must match ship_date to the correct week.

accessorials._note: valid_for restricts which shipment types may legitimately carry this charge. If a line's shipment context doesn't match, it's an unauthorized accessorial.

customers._note: Each customer has a contracted discount off tariff linehaul, plus optional waivers (accessorials that must NOT be billed to them) and free allowances.

ACME-1001.name: Acme Manufacturing
ACME-1001.notes: Residential surcharge waived per master agreement. First 30 min detention free.

INITECH-1003.name: Initech Distribution
INITECH-1003.notes: High-volume account. Liftgate and redelivery waived entirely.
